description: Configure the Chrome browser for a shared checkout terminal in a cinema equipment rental house according to the specification document at ~/Desktop/checkout_terminal_standard.txt. Organize the 17 work bookmarks into folders named 'Inventory', 'Camera Manuals', 'Insurance', and 'Logistics', and remove all 8 personal bookmarks. Configure site settings to block notifications globally and block pop-ups except for 'rentman.io'. Disable all autofill features, including passwords, auto sign-in, addresses, and payment methods. Set the default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/Invoices without prompting for location and configure the browser to open 'https://rentman.io/login' on startup.
